id: FIN-501
title: Automated Invoice Generation on Delivery Confirmation
persona: Shipper / Trucker (Owner-Operator)
priority: High
status: 📝 Planned
---

# FIN-501 — Automated Invoice Generation on Delivery Confirmation

**As a** Trucker,
**I want** a PDF invoice to be automatically generated when a load is marked `DELIVERED`,
**so that** I have an immediate, standardised payment request without manual paperwork, and the shipper has a reconcilable record tied to the POD.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `LoadDeliveredEvent` (consumed by the outbox relay, INF-202) triggers `InvoiceGenerationService`; the service generates a PDF containing: load ID, origin/destination, POD reference URL, gross rate, detention charges, lumper fees, platform fee, net amount due
- [ ] `invoices` table: `id UUID`, `tenant_id UUID`, `load_id UUID UNIQUE`, `invoice_number VARCHAR UNIQUE`, `amount_due NUMERIC(10,2)`, `currency_code VARCHAR(3) DEFAULT 'USD'`, `status VARCHAR DEFAULT 'UNPAID'`, `generated_at TIMESTAMPTZ`, `pdf_key TEXT`; RLS on `tenant_id` — satisfies **REQ-103**; index on `(tenant_id, status)` — satisfies **NFR-503**
- [ ] `invoice_number` is generated as `INV-{YYYYMM}-{sequence}`; the sequence is tenant-scoped and maintained in a `invoice_sequences(tenant_id, year_month, last_seq)` table with a row-level lock to prevent gaps
- [ ] PDF is stored via `StorageService` and the `pdf_key` is written to `invoices.pdf_key`; download available via `GET /api/v1/invoices/{invoiceId}/download` (requires `authenticated()` + matching `tenant_id`)
- [ ] Cyclomatic complexity ≤ 10 in `InvoiceGenerationService.generate()` — satisfies **NFR-501**; PDF content assembly is delegated to `InvoicePdfBuilder`
- [ ] `InvoiceGeneratedEvent` is written to `audit_log` with the invoice number and amount — satisfies **REQ-402**
- [ ] JaCoCo branch coverage ≥ 80% including: successful generation; `StorageService` failure → retry via outbox; duplicate delivery event → idempotency check prevents second invoice (EC-402) — satisfies **NFR-502**

## Related Stories
- OPS-403 (DELIVERED state triggers this flow)
- EC-402 (idempotency key prevents duplicate invoices)
- FIN-503 (invoice is the payment trigger)
- DOC-502 (POD URL is referenced in the invoice)
